_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin Deficiency Induces Endothelial Cell Proliferation and Retinal Neovascularization.

_contextSnippet: Nf1flox/+;Tie2cre retinas exhibited increased neovascularization, which was similar qualitatively and quantitatively to Nf1+/− retinas... central vessel dropout was markedly reduced
details: Increased neovascularization similar to Nf1+/- retinas but markedly reduced central vessel dropout compared to Nf1+/- mice
